channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Vehicle has been here sinfe midnight, lights were left on and vehicle just left here, 19th June
item.description:
There is a vehicle obstructing one full lane at the junction of Tannsfeld Road and Newlands Park. Traffic is being forced into the oncoming lane to pass. This is an active road hazard. I have reported this twice already to the metropolitan police who can’t seem to grasp what an obstruction is and haven’t prioritized a towing despite having the alexandra building right there. It’s now been an obstruction has now been for over 12 hours. Please log this as a dangerous obstruction, not a parking issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tannsfeld Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated sign - out, 19th June
item.description:
Sign on lamp post is out

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti, 19th June
item.description:
Offensive graffiti on bus stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kentish Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked on pavement, 19th June
item.description:
Silver Audi is parked on the pavement and not in a car parking space. This is dangerous to walkway users when a car is driving on the path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Cambridge Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed abandoned vehicle, 19th June
item.description:
Cars been here for months it's untaxed in our carpark at the back of 59 Lawrance gardens
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Lawrance Gardens, Cheshunt, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Needs cutting back, 19th June
item.description:
Obscuring path

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in railings in a number of areas in North Cray Road, 19th June
item.description:
Could the litter be dealt with please. It has been accumulating for many months. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135, North Cray Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees need pruning, 19th June
item.description:
The trees at the top end of this end of the road ( low numbers are far too big, they are blocking out TV signals and roots are damaging house foundations. Can you at least trim them like you used to years back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shenfield Crescent, Shenfield, Brentwood, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard and pavement broken, 19th June
item.description:
The bollard has been struck by a vehicle, breaking the surrounding paving. It is obstructing the pavement, making it hard for prams and wheelchairs to pass, and is a trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Astbury Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass on grass verge needs immediate attention, 19th June
item.description:
Resident reporting the grass verge along Crayford Way No 101, 93 & 83 has overgrown and not been cut for over 2 months and it now look s like a Meadow. Please could someone look into this it has been reported by another resident aswell
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crayford Way, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please cut the grass my shoes are covered in dog poo, 19th June
item.description:
I have no idea why they cut the edges and not the main area it’s so long and a danger to dogs with grass seeds but also there is so much dog poo everywhere where I’m guessing it can’t be picked up properly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shuttlemead, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White bar marking, 19th June
item.description:
Paid for road marking to be repaint a year ago and chasing as still hasn't been done
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins in road, 19th June
item.description:
Two wheeled bins placed on the highway at Amberley Court.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Amberley Court, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish being dumped everyday, 19th June
item.description:
Your solution seem to be adding a new no fly tipping sign, you need to start catching these people and prosecuting them. A camera can't cost that much, if I lived on that street I'd happily set on up in those properties could you approach the neighbors to see if they would help catch these people?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Burtwell Lane, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal disable parking sign, 19th June
item.description:
A resident from 101 created an unauthorised road markings that appeared to designate a disabled parking space. The markings were not officially approved or installed by the local authority.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 19th June
item.description:
By side of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Local Shop Refurbishment/ Unlicenced Waste, 19th June
item.description:
Vy nails and spa using unlicensed waste carrier to dispose of 3 large truckloads of waste. Enforcement/fine requested.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Kimmeridge Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lethal pothole for cyclists, 19th June
item.description:
See attached photo. I take it the council has put this cover over a collapsed drain cover. The cover has moved and is now more of a danger. Almost came off my bike having hit it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 231, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped sofas on Bournemouth road, 19th June
item.description:
On going flytipping, several currently sofas have been flytipped. I have CCTV footage of this incident. It took place on 17th June at approximately 9:05pm-9:15pm. I am happy to share this with your team.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Bournemouth Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes left on the pavement near 50-52 Wharf Road, 19th June
item.description:
Bikes left on the pavement near 50-52 Wharf Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44-48, Wharf Road, Hoxton, Greater London
